title: 샘플 덱 제목
_doc: 참고 템플릿. 각 슬라이드는 {title,html,note} 또는 {title,divider:true,note}. html은 .gr/.cd/.ic/.flow/.stat/.pill/.tag + inline <svg> 사용. 그라데이션 id='h'(시안→퍼플) 재사용.

slides.title: 허브-스포크 다이어그램
slides.html: <svg viewBox='0 0 700 320' style='width:100%;max-height:52vh'><defs><linearGradient id='h' x1='0' x2='1'><stop offset='0' stop-color='#22d3ee'/><stop offset='1' stop-color='#7b2ff7'/></linearGradient></defs><circle cx='350' cy='160' r='60' fill='url(#h)'/><text x='350' y='165' fill='#fff' font-size='14' font-weight='800' text-anchor='middle'>HUB</text><g font-size='13' fill='#dbe6ff' text-anchor='middle'><text x='350' y='40'>요소1</text><text x='600' y='160'>요소2</text><text x='350' y='300'>요소3</text><text x='105' y='160'>요소4</text></g></svg>
